dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Welcome back! Here's an overview of your account.

CreditTransactions.anonymous_migration_bonus: New user bonus: Saved {cardCount} images for free

Support.title: Support Center
Support.subtitle: View and manage your support tickets
Support.adminSubtitle: View and handle support tickets from all users
Support.noTicketsDescription: You haven't submitted any support tickets yet

backend.title: Image backend
backend.description: Choose the default system backend account-pool group for web generation. This does not affect external API calls; external API keys choose their own group in the API key list, and unbound keys use the platform default group.

moderation.title: Moderation block level
moderation.description: This setting applies only to web (creation page) generation and only takes effect when moderation blocking is enabled; requests made with an external API key use that key's own level.
moderation.upgradeHint: Ultra can allow low-risk results. Enterprise can also allow medium-risk results.
moderation.disabledByPlan: Moderation blocking is not enabled for your current plan, so this setting has no effect.

low.label: Block low and above
low.description: Strictest: low, medium, and high are blocked.

medium.label: Allow low
medium.description: Blocks medium and high only. Available on Ultra.

high.label: Block high only
high.description: Allows low and medium. Available on Enterprise.

externalApi.title: External API access
externalApi.description: Create {brandName} OpenAI-compatible API keys for other sites or applications. Image generation and image edits require Starter or higher; Responses requires Pro or higher. External calls use your account credits and appear in your generation history.
externalApi.requiresStarter: Your current plan cannot create or use external API keys. Upgrade to Starter or higher.
externalApi.responsesRequiresPro: POST /v1/responses requires Pro plan or higher.
externalApi.newKeyLabel: New API key. It is shown only once.
externalApi.confirmDelete: Delete this revoked API key? This cannot be undone.

quota.label: Credit limit
quota.description: Each API key can have its own total credit limit. Leave it empty for unlimited; account credits are still consumed.

moderation.label: Moderation level
moderation.hint: The moderation level only takes effect when moderation blocking is enabled; it has no effect when moderation is off.
moderation.disabledByPlan: Moderation blocking is not enabled for your current plan, so API key moderation levels have no effect.

errors.quota: Failed to update API key quota
errors.quotaInvalid: Enter a credit limit greater than or equal to 0, or leave it empty for unlimited

warning.title: Advanced Configuration
warning.description: Configure your own OpenAI-compatible API endpoint. When active, image generation will use your API key instead of platform credits.

apiConfig.modelHint: Leave blank to use the default model
apiConfig.useStreamDescription: Send stream=true and accept New API image event streams.
apiConfig.paidOnly: Custom API configuration is available on Starter and higher plans.
apiConfig.requiresPaid: Custom API requires Starter plan or higher
apiConfig.testNeedsInput: Enter the API base URL and key first
apiConfig.testNoImage: Connected but no image returned (model may not support image generation)

general.title: General
general.description: Update your personal information and account settings.
general.name: Name
general.nameDescription: Name is required and must be at least 2 characters.
general.emailDescription: To change your email, please contact support.

avatar.title: Avatar
avatar.description: Upload a profile picture to personalize your account.
avatar.supportedFormats: Supports JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP, max {size}MB

language.title: Language Settings
language.description: Select your preferred language for the interface.

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.warning: This action is irreversible. Please proceed with caution.
deleteAccount.confirmDescription: Your account and all associated data will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.error: Failed to delete account. Please try again later.

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.description: Update your password to keep your account secure.

errors.missingFields: Please fill in all password fields.
errors.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.samePassword: New password must be different from current password.

billing.description: Manage subscriptions, billing history, and credit usage here.

currentPlan.title: Current Plan
currentPlan.description: Manage your subscription and billing cycle.
currentPlan.premiumFeatures: API, chat, and model benefits follow your current plan

cancelDialog.title: Cancel Subscription?
cancelDialog.description: Your subscription will remain active until the end of your current billing period ({date}). After that, your plan will revert to Free.
cancelDialog.keepBenefits: You'll keep all your current plan benefits until {date}

paymentMethods.title: Payment Methods
paymentMethods.description: Add or manage your payment methods for subscriptions and purchases.
paymentMethods.noMethodsHint: Add a payment method to upgrade your plan or purchase credits

history.title: Billing History
history.description: View and download your past invoices.
history.noHistoryHint: Your invoices will appear here after your first purchase

getMoreCredits.title: Get More Credits
getMoreCredits.description: Buy one-time pay-as-you-go credits, or subscribe for monthly credits and advanced features

transactions.title: Transaction History
transactions.description: View all your credit transactions including grants and consumption
transactions.noTransactionsHint: Your credit transactions will appear here
